description: You are a senior Java engineer at a fintech company. The bank-ledger-system project at ~/IdeaProjects/bank-ledger-system/ is a multi-module Maven application implementing a banking ledger and transaction processing system with three modules: bank-commons (shared models), bank-ledger (double-entry bookkeeping and balance calculation), and bank-processing (transaction validation and batch operations). The project currently fails to build, and once build issues are resolved, multiple tests fail across modules due to logic bugs. Fix all build and logic issues so that the project compiles successfully and all tests pass. Do not modify any test files.
